intro: Drummondita miniata, also known as the Red Drummondita, is a flowering plant species native to Brazil. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, offering various health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are believed to aid in the treatment of conditions like fever, pain, and respiratory issues. Bioactive constituents of Drummondita miniata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Herbal preparations made with Drummondita miniata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe the respiratory system, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
